subcodes.first_line: O Concourse of the Bayán! Fear ye the All-Merciful, and be not of them that have wronged [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا البیان اتقوا الرحمن و لاتکونوا من الظالمین قد
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement
